title: Squirrel Removal in Garden City, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Garden City, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Garden City homes. Call today!
intro: Garden City's tree-lined streets and beautiful residential properties make it an ideal habitat for squirrels, but when they invade your attic or walls, professional removal becomes essential. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Garden City, from the historic Cathedral area to the elegant homes near Seventh Street. Our experienced technicians offer humane removal, complete exclusion work, and damage restoration to protect your Long Island home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Garden City and Long Island communities for years with licensed, insured technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of Nassau County's premium residential areas. We combine humane wildlife removal techniques with thorough exclusion services and offer warranties on our work to ensure squirrels don't return to your Garden City property.
localContext: Garden City's mature oak and maple trees, historic Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to Eisenhower Park create perfect conditions for squirrel populations to thrive. The village's strict building codes and well-maintained properties mean homeowners need professional-grade solutions that preserve their home's integrity while effectively addressing squirrel infestations in attics, chimneys, and soffits.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Garden City?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Garden City typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Garden City properties.

faqs.question: What are the signs of squirrels in my Garden City attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the early morning or evening, chewed wood around roof lines and soffits, visible entry holes near the roofline, droppings in the attic, and damaged insulation. Garden City homeowners often first notice squirrels running along fence lines or power lines before discovering attic access.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Garden City humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-catch trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations and Garden City village ordinances. Squirrels are safely relocated away from residential areas. We never use poisons or harmful methods, ensuring the safety of your family, pets, and the local ecosystem.

faqs.question: How do you prevent squirrels from returning to my Garden City home?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive exclusion service seals all potential entry points using heavy-gauge steel mesh, reinforced vent covers, and chimney caps that squirrels cannot chew through. We inspect your entire roofline, trim back overhanging tree branches that provide access, and install one-way doors to ensure all squirrels exit. All exclusion work comes with a warranty for Garden City homeowners.
